snippet.title: I Played 100 Hours Of Crimson Desert - A PERFECTLY BALANCED GAME WITH NO EXPLOITS #ad
snippet.description:
Crimson Desert is finally here and I was lucky enough to be one of the few creators given early access to the game to make a video! And so here we are we an amazing video sponsored from the developers at pearlabyss! link to the game: https://pearlabyss.info/CrimsonDesert_TheSpiffingBrit

So today I the spiffing brit want to see if this insanely huge game is a perfectly balanced adventure with no exploits or if I the spiffing brit can do my usual tactic of finding  overpowered game mechanics to exploit! Today I am showcasing the power of an infinite attack spear build and the explosive stun lock extravaganza of archery! With just two explosive arrows you too can keep anything stunned and transform an impossible task into a walk in the park!


So what is crimson desert well according to steam: Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure set on the continent of Pywel. Join Kliff on his journey to rebuild the Greymane faction and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ruins and the mysterious Abyss, forge your path through battles and discovery.

I would largely agree with that assessment. Its got flavours of skyrim, the witcher 3, breath of the wild and dark souls. But at the same time it is doing its own thing. It has some similarity with black desert online but this is definitely a single player game. So yeah its an everything kind of game where you can just get lost and enjoy the huge open world adventure, discover crafting and cooking recipes, puzzles, hidden easter eggs, unique equipment and rare gems to socket into your gear.

snippet.title: WILD HORSE NINE | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
snippet.description:
In theaters November 6, 2026. 

Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris (John Malkovich) and Lee (Sam Rockwell) are dispatched from Santiago to Easter island by their bureau chief, MJ (Steve Buscemi). Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students (Mariana di Girolamo and Ailín Salas) threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

Written by: Martin McDonagh

snippet.title: Cryo Archive Launch Trailer | Marathon
snippet.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026.

snippet.title: Balls Up - Official Red Band Trailer (2026) Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Sacha Baron Cohen
snippet.description:
Don't miss the Red Band Trailer for Balls Up, a comedy film distributed by Amazon MGM Studios. Secure a condom sponsorship with the World Cup in Balls Up, streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

In Balls Up, marketing executives Brad and Elijah go “balls out” and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

Balls Up stars Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Benjamin Bratt, Eva De Dominici, Daniela Melchior, with Molly Shannon, Sacha Baron Cohen, and Eric André. The film is directed by Peter Farrelly and produced by David Ellison, Dana Goldberg, Don Granger, Andrew Muscato, Paul Wernick, and Rhett Reese.

Balls Up is streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

snippet.title: The Outlast Trials - Project Judas | Cinematic Trailer
snippet.description:
The stage is set, and the cameras are rolling, let Anarchy reign.  🎥

The Kress Twins will return in a new Trial environment, the Television Studio, to exert their power on on the masses by installing a celebrity talking head as a political candidate. 📺 Meanwhile, turmoil brews within the Sinyala Facility... will control hold?

Project Judas will release Tuesday March 24th at 10am ET
_____________________

Le décor est posé, les caméras tournent, que l'anarchie règne. 🎥

Les Jumeaux Kress feront leur retour dans un nouvel environnement des Épreuves, le Studio de Télévision, pour exercer leur pouvoir sur les masses en présentant une personnalité médiatique comme candidat politique. 📺 Pendant ce temps, l'agitation gronde au sein du Centre Sinyala... Le contrôle tiendra-t-il ?

L'update Projet Judas sortira le mardi 24 mars à 10h HE.
_____________________

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER (Lyrics)
Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER 
i see her in the back of my mind all the time lyrics     

Stream:-  
https://open.spotify.com/track/3QaPy1KgI7nu9FJEQUgn6h?si=f579c5a69c65454b 



Follow Billie Eilish:
https://www.tiktok.com/@billieeilish
https://www.instagram.com/billieeilish
https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCERrDZ8oN0U_n9MphMKERcg?feature=gws_kp_artist&feature=gws_kp_artist




Lyrics:- 
[Verse 1]
Things fall apart
And time breaks your heart
I wasn't there, but I know
She was your girl
You showed her the world
But fell out of love and you both let go


[Pre-Chorus]
She was cryin’ on my shoulder
All I could do was hold her
Only made us closer until July
Now, I know that you love me
You don't need to remind me
I should put it all behind me, shouldn't I?


[Chorus]
But I see her in the back of my mind all the time
Like a fever, like I’m burning alive, like a sign
Did I cross the line?


[Post-Chorus]
(Mm) Hmm

[Verse 2]
Well, good things don't last (Good things don't last)
And life moves so fast (Life moves so fast)
I'd never ask who was better (I'd never ask who was better)
'Cause she couldn't be (Couldn't)
More different from me (Different)
Happy and free in leather (Happy)

[Pre-Chorus]
And I know that you love me (You love me)
You don’t need to remind me (Remind me)
Wanna put it all behind me, but baby


[Chorus]
I see her in the back of my mind (Back of my mind) all the time (All the time)
Feels like a fever (Like a fever), like I’m burning alive (Burning alive), like a sign
Did I cross the line?


[Bridge]
You say no one knows you so well (Oh)
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
Valentine's Day, cryin’ in the hotel
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself


[Chorus]
And I wonder
Do you see her in the back of your mind in my eyes?


[Outro]
You say no one knows you so well
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
I know you didn’t mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
